description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Trade Management product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Claim LOV).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows low privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Trade Management.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of Oracle Trade Management. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 8.8 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H).
